context: An agricultural science student wanted to test the pH of a sample of soil before deciding what crops to sow.

parts.text: Identify any two pieces of equipment labelled A, B or C required for this investigation.
State the pH of the soil filtrate.
solution: The pH of the soil filtrate needs to be measured using the pH probe and Universal Indicator.

parts.text: State a conclusion the student can make in relation to growing crops.
solution: If the pH is within the optimal range for the crops, the student can proceed with planting. If not, the student may need to adjust the pH of the soil.

parts.text: Draw a labelled diagram showing this activity.
